narrative: Hawkish Fed commentary and renewed Iran strikes drive a dollar bid as Vice Chair Jefferson and Logan flag persistent inflation risks — USD/JPY firms to 162.44, supported by a +275bp OIS carry advantage, while USD/CHF options price a notable +5.7% VRP (IV 12.3% vs HV30 6.6%) reflecting strong hedging demand. Global equities slip and crude firmed, with gold lower -0.21%; equities -0.51%; DXY +0.01%; VIX 16.7. Watch the ECB rate decision on July 23 for the next major policy catalyst.
